overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a drive through a neon-lit underground tunnel transitioning to on-foot exploration of a futuristic urban downtown at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, holographic advertisements, dense cyberpunk architecture, and a mix of vehicle and pedestrian navigation.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underground tunnel with holographic advertisements

events.description: futuristic black sedan overtakes on the right side
passing under bright blue neon tube lights illuminating the tunnel walls
approaching tunnel exit with visible light at the end of the passage

agents.ego_description: driving through the underground tunnel following a red sports car, maintaining steady speed behind traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car with glowing taillights driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: exposed concrete ceiling with grid pattern and structural beams
smooth concrete wall with occasional graffiti tags
wall covered in colorful cyberpunk graffiti and murals
metal safety barriers lining both sides of the road
large glowing advertisement for El Guapo with stylized graphics
red circular corporate logo on black background
large industrial fan units embedded in the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow enclosed tunnel with wet asphalt reflecting blue and pink neon lights. The concrete walls feature cyberpunk graffiti and holographic advertisements for El Guapo and Arasaka. The camera follows a red sports car through the gently curving passage, passing under ventilation fans and yellow guardrails.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from tunnel to open urban street with elevated highways

events.description: exits the enclosed tunnel into open air revealing towering skyscrapers and elevated highways
ambient lighting shifts from artificial tunnel lights to mixed city glow and night sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive as the environment opens up, navigating the transition from tunnel to city streets

notable_agents.action: white sports car accelerating ahead onto the open road

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structures and highway ramps towering above the street
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows rising in the distance
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk at the tunnel exit
ground floor commercial spaces with glowing entrance lights

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a semi-covered urban environment where massive elevated highway ramps dominate the skyline. The lighting shifts from artificial neon to mixed city glow as skyscrapers become visible in the background. The camera continues driving past palm trees and street-level shops while following the white sports car ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highways with commercial storefronts

events.description: exits vehicle and begins walking, turning left and ascending concrete stairs
enters covered pedestrian walkway with other pedestrians and neon storefronts
crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking along the cyberpunk city sidewalk, exploring the environment and observing pedestrians and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk
group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the covered walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with white railings leading up from street level
concrete overhang structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
commercial shop fronts with glowing orange and blue neon signs
futuristic vending machine with illuminated display screen
street sign reading Ellison mounted on a pole at the intersection
massive vertical digital screens displaying advertisements on building facades
red and white striped barriers blocking off part of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from driving to walking, the camera ascends concrete stairs and enters a covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways. The environment features moderate crowds of pedestrians, neon-lit storefronts, and massive digital billboards on surrounding skyscrapers. The character walks along the wet concrete sidewalk, passing vending machines and construction barriers, before crossing at the Ellison street intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a neon-lit tunnel into the expansive scale of a futuristic urban center. It begins by trailing a red sports car through a narrow, curving passage where wet asphalt reflects vibrant blue and pink neon lights and holographic advertisements for El Guapo and Arasaka line the graffiti-covered walls. As the vehicle passes under ventilation fans and yellow guardrails, the enclosed space gradually opens up, transitioning the lighting from artificial neon to a mixed city glow. The scene then expands into a semi-covered environment dominated by massive elevated highway ramps and distant skyscrapers, before continuing past palm trees and street-level shops while following a white sports car ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vehicular perspective to an on-foot exploration of a dense, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins as the camera ascends concrete stairs, leaving the road behind to enter a covered pedestrian walkway sheltered beneath towering elevated highways. As the character moves forward, the environment opens up into a bustling thoroughfare filled with moderate crowds, passing by glowing vending machines and construction barriers along a wet concrete sidewalk. The scene then expands to reveal massive digital billboards and neon storefronts clinging to the surrounding skyscrapers before finally turning toward the wide Ellison street intersection.
